'''ngayava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fiberboard|fiberboard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-y-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fiberboard|fiberboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngayava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || ngæyævæth || ngæyævæj || ngæyævæsh || ngæyævæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || ngayayavath || ngayayavaj || ngayayavash || ngayayava
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || ngayavath || ngayavaj || ngayavash || ngayava
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || ngayafvafth || ngayafvafj || ngayafvafsh || ngayafvaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ngayavatha || ngayavaja || ngayavasha || ngayavaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || ngayavath || ngayavaj || ngayavash || ngayava
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ngayavathal || ngayavajal || ngayavashal || ngayavakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ngayavaathatha || ngayavaajaja || ngayavaashasha || ngayavaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || ngayavathan || ngayavajan || ngayavashan || ngayavakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ngayavathaoro || ngayavajaoro || ngayavashaoro || ngayavakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
